debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
h_not_same : u ≠ v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor_cfd : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
rightSide : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z }) := (↑dstep.prod).rhs
allChildren : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_2 α nt G u v cfd u' dstep sound
    (fun derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }))
    derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd (fun h_same h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor => [])
    fun u'' dstep' derivation' sound' h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor =>
    have u'_comp := ⋯;
    have derivation_exhaustive :=
      ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustive_imp_child_exhaustive α nt G u v cfd h_exhaustive u' dstep
        derivation sound ⋯;
    collectDerivationTreeNodes derivation derivation_exhaustive ⋯
u_comp✝ : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
var_len_1 : (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len = 1
pre_len_less_u_len : dstep.pre.len < u.len
u_comp : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
suf_len_less_u_len : dstep.suf.len < u.len
leftOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.pre.len, ⋯⟩
rightOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.suf.len, ⋯⟩
rhs_symbol_count : ℕ := (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
u'_eq_result : dstep.result = u'
n : ℕ
h_num_vars_rhs : (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len = n + 1
h_rhs_non_empty : 1 ≤ (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
h_u_vs_u'_len : u'.len = u.len + (rhs_symbol_count - 1)
h_u_vs_u'_len₂ : u.len ≤ u'.len
u_range_subset_u'_range : Finset.range u.len ⊆ Finset.range u'.len
leftOfVarCount₂ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } := ⟨↑leftOfVarCount, ⋯⟩
index₁ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
h_index_valid : ∃ location ∈ allChildren, location.2 = index₁
afunc : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) →
  G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } → List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
afuncDef :
  afunc = fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
a : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) := List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
aDef : a = List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
head₁ : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail₁ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
head₂ : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail₂ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
ind_hyp₂ :
  (tail₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc tail₁ tail₂ ≠ []) → head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc (head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ ≠ []
ind_hyp₁ : tail₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc tail₁ (head₂ :: tail₂) ≠ []
h_head_tail_neq_nil : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ []
h_pos₂ : tail₂ ≠ []
h_neg₁ : ¬tail₁ ≠ []
⊢ List.foldl afunc (head₁ :: tail₁) (head₂ :: tail₂) ≠ []

proof:
simp at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    have h_gen : ∀ l s, s ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc s l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l
                      induction l with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        intro s hs
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]
                        apply ih
                        simp [afuncDef]
                        split <;> simp [hs]
                    apply h_gen
                    simp
failed_attempts:
rw [List.foldl_cons]
                    apply ind_hyp₂
                    simp [afuncDef]
                    split <;> simp

have aux : ∀ l' x, l' ≠ [] → afunc l' x ≠ [] := fun l' x hne => by
                      simp [afuncDef]
                      split
                      · simp; intro h; rw [List.append_eq_nil] at h; exact hne h.1
                      · exact hne
                    have gen : ∀ L l', l' ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc l' L ≠ [] := fun L =>
                      List.rec (fun l' h => by simp; exact h) (fun x xs ih l' h => by rw [List.foldl_cons]; exact ih _ (aux _ _ h)) L
                    exact gen (head₂ :: tail₂) _ h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h_extends : ∀ l acc, ∃ s, List.foldl afunc acc l = acc ++ s := by
                      intro l
                      induction l with
                      | nil => intro acc; exists []; rfl
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        intro acc
                        simp
                        have h_step : ∃ s', afunc acc x = acc ++ s' := by
                          rw [afuncDef]
                          rcases x with ⟨dt, idx⟩
                          simp
                          split
                          next => exists [(dt, idx)]; simp
                          next => exists []; simp
                        obtain ⟨s', hs'⟩ := h_step
                        rw [hs']
                        obtain ⟨s'', hs''⟩ := ih (acc ++ s')
                        exists (s' ++ s'')
                        rw [hs'', List.append_assoc]
                    obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := h_extends (head₂ :: tail₂) (head₁ :: tail₁)
                    rw [hs]
                    simp

have h_aux : ∀ l1 l2, l1 ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc l1 l2 ≠ [] := by
                      intro l1 l2
                      induction l2 generalizing l1
                      case nil => intro h; exact h
                      case cons b bs ih =>
                        intro h
                        simp
                        apply ih
                        rw [afuncDef]
                        split <;> simp [h]
                    apply h_aux
                    simp

have h_step : ∀ l x, l ≠ [] → afunc l x ≠ [] := by
                      intro l ⟨dt, idx⟩ hl
                      rw [afuncDef]
                      simp
                      split
                      · intro h
                        have h_len : (l ++ [(dt, idx)]).length = 0 := by rw [h]; rfl
                        simp at h_len
                        contradiction
                      · exact hl
                    have h_fold : ∀ l acc, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l
                      induction l with
                      | nil => intro acc h; simp; exact h
                      | cons y ys ih => intro acc h; simp; apply ih; apply h_step; exact h
                    apply h_fold
                    simp

have mono : ∀ l (acc : List _), acc.length ≤ (List.foldl afunc acc l).length := by
                      intro l acc
                      induction l generalizing acc with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        simp
                        apply Nat.le_trans _ (ih (afunc acc x))
                        simp [afunc]
                        split <;> simp
                    have : (List.foldl afunc (head₁ :: tail₁) (head₂ :: tail₂)).length > 0 :=
                      Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (by simp) (mono _ _)
                    intro h
                    rw [h] at this
                    simp at this
                    contradiction

rw [List.foldl_cons]
                    have mono : ∀ l x, l ≠ [] → afunc l x ≠ [] := by
                      intro l x hl
                      simp [afuncDef]
                      split
                      · intro h_eq; rw [List.append_eq_nil] at h_eq; exact hl h_eq.1
                      · exact hl
                    have preserve : ∀ ys l, l ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc l ys ≠ [] := by
                      intro ys
                      induction ys with
                      | nil => intro l hl; simp; exact hl
                      | cons y ys ih =>
                        intro l hl
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]
                        apply ih
                        apply mono _ _ hl
                    apply preserve
                    apply mono
                    simp

have preserves_ne : ∀ (l : List _) (acc : List _), acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l
                      induction l with
                      | nil =>
                        intro acc h
                        exact h
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        intro acc h
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]
                        apply ih
                        rw [afuncDef]
                        split
                        · simp
                        · exact h
                    apply preserves_ne
                    exact h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h_len : ∀ (l₁ l₂ : List _), l₁.length ≤ (List.foldl afunc l₁ l₂).length := by
                      intro l₁ l₂
                      induction l₂ generalizing l₁
                      case nil => simp
                      case cons y ys ih =>
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]
                        apply Nat.le_trans _ (ih _)
                        simp [afuncDef]
                        by_cases h : index₁ = y.2
                        · rw [dif_pos h]; simp; apply Nat.le_succ
                        · rw [dif_neg h]; exact Nat.le_refl _
                    apply List.ne_nil_of_length_pos
                    apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le _ (h_len _ _)
                    simp

have mono : ∀ l (acc : List (DerivationTree G × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })), acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l
                      induction l generalizing acc with
                      | nil => intro acc h; exact h
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        intro acc h
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]
                        apply ih
                        simp [afuncDef]
                        split
                        · cases acc <;> simp
                        · exact h
                    apply mono
                    simp

have h_preserve : ∀ l x, l ≠ [] → afunc l x ≠ [] := by
                      intro l x hl
                      rw [afuncDef]
                      simp
                      split
                      · intro h; have := List.length_append l [x]; rw [h] at this; simp at this
                      · exact hl
                    have h_fold : ∀ L acc, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc L ≠ [] := by
                      intro L; induction L with
                      | nil => intro acc h; exact h
                      | cons y ys ih => intro acc h; simp; apply ih; apply h_preserve _ _ h
                    apply h_fold; simp

have h_foldl_ne_nil : ∀ (l acc : List _), acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l
                      induction l with
                      | nil => intro acc h; exact h
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        intro acc h
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]
                        apply ih
                        simp [afuncDef]
                        by_cases h_eq : index₁ = x.2
                        · simp [h_eq]
                          have h_ne : acc ++ [(x.1, x.2)] ≠ [] := by simp
                          exact h_ne
                        · simp [h_eq]
                          exact h
                    apply h_foldl_ne_nil
                    simp

let rec aux (l : List _) (acc : List _) (h : acc ≠ []) : List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] :=
                      match l with
                      | [] => h
                      | x :: xs => aux xs (afunc acc x) (by
                          simp [afuncDef]
                          split
                          · simp [List.append_eq_nil]; intro c; exact h c.1
                          · exact h)
                    apply aux (head₂ :: tail₂) (head₁ :: tail₁) (by simp)
                case neg h_neg₂ =>
                  simp [h_neg₂]
                  simp [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  split <;> simp [h_head_tail_neq_nil]

let rec aux (acc : List _) (l : List _) (h_acc : acc ≠ []) : List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      match l with
                      | [] => exact h_acc
                      | y :: ys =>
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]
                        apply aux
                        rw [afuncDef]
                        by_cases h_eq : index₁ = y.2
                        · simp only [h_eq, dite_true]
                          intro h_nil
                          exact h_acc (List.append_eq_nil.mp h_nil).left
                        · simp only [h_eq, dite_false]
                          exact h_acc
                    exact aux (head₁ :: tail₁) (head₂ :: tail₂) h_head_tail_neq_nil

have len_pos : ∀ (l : List _) (acc : List _), acc.length > 0 → (List.foldl afunc acc l).length > 0 := by
                      intro l
                      induction l with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        intro acc h
                        simp
                        apply ih
                        simp [afuncDef]
                        split
                        · rw [List.length_append]
                          simp
                          apply Nat.lt_trans h (Nat.lt_succ_self _)
                        · exact h
                    intro h_nil
                    have h := len_pos (head₂ :: tail₂) (head₁ :: tail₁) (by simp)
                    rw [h_nil] at h
                    simp at h
                    exact h

have h_fold : ∀ (zs : List _) (l : List _), l ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc l zs ≠ [] := by
                      intro zs l hl
                      induction zs generalizing l with
                      | nil => exact hl
                      | cons z zs ih =>
                        rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                        apply ih
                        by_cases h : index₁ = z.2
                        · simp [h]
                          intro contra
                          simp at contra
                          exact hl contra.1
                        · simp [h]
                          exact hl
                    apply h_fold
                    exact h_head_tail_neq_nil

have pres : ∀ l x, l ≠ [] → afunc l x ≠ [] := by
                      intro l x nl
                      rw [afuncDef]
                      split
                      · cases l <;> simp
                      · exact nl
                    have step : ∀ l a, a ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc a l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l
                      induction l with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        intro a nn
                        simp
                        apply ih
                        apply pres _ _ nn
                    apply step
                    simp

have h_tail₁_nil : tail₁ = [] := by
                      match h : tail₁ with
                      | [] => rfl
                      | _::_ =>
                        have : tail₁ ≠ [] := by rw [h]; simp
                        contradiction
                    rw [h_tail₁_nil, List.foldl_cons]
                    have afunc_ne : ∀ acc x, acc ≠ [] → afunc acc x ≠ [] := by
                      intro acc x h
                      rw [afuncDef]
                      dsimp
                      split
                      · simp; intro h'; exact h h'
                      · exact h
                    let rec fold_ne (l : List _) (acc : List _) (h : acc ≠ []) : List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] :=
                      match l with
                      | [] => h
                      | x :: xs => by
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]
                        exact fold_ne xs (afunc acc x) (afunc_ne acc x h)
                    apply fold_ne
                    apply afunc_ne
                    simp

have helper : ∀ l z, z ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc z l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l
                      induction l
                      case nil => simp; intros; assumption
                      case cons x xs ih =>
                        intros z hz
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]
                        apply ih
                        simp [afuncDef]
                        split
                        . simp
                        . exact hz
                    apply helper
                    exact h_head_tail_neq_nil
successful_attempts:
simp at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    have h_gen : ∀ l s, s ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc s l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l
                      induction l with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        intro s hs
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]
                        apply ih
                        simp [afuncDef]
                        split <;> simp [hs]
                    apply h_gen
                    simp

have h_fold : ∀ l acc, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l
                      induction l with
                      | nil => intro acc h; exact h
                      | cons h t ih =>
                        intro acc h
                        apply ih
                        rw [afuncDef]
                        dsimp
                        split
                        · simp
                        · exact h
                    apply h_fold
                    simp

have preserve_ne : ∀ (l : List _) (acc : List _), acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l acc h_ne
                      induction l generalizing acc
                      case nil => exact h_ne
                      case cons y ys ih =>
                        apply ih
                        rw [afuncDef]
                        dsimp
                        split
                        · cases acc
                          · contradiction
                          · simp
                        · exact h_ne
                    apply preserve_ne
                    simp

have afunc_ne_nil : ∀ (l zs : List _), l ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc l zs ≠ [] := by
                      intro l zs
                      induction zs generalizing l
                      case nil => simp
                      case cons z zs ih =>
                        intro h
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]
                        apply ih
                        rw [afuncDef]
                        dsimp
                        split
                        · simp
                        · exact h
                    apply afunc_ne_nil
                    simp

have preserves_nonempty (l : List _) (acc : List _) (h : acc ≠ []) : List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      induction l generalizing acc with
                      | nil => exact h
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        apply ih
                        rw [afuncDef]
                        simp
                        split <;> simp [h]
                    apply preserves_nonempty
                    exact h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h_mono : ∀ l acc, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l
                      induction l
                      case nil => intro acc h; simp; exact h
                      case cons y ys IH =>
                        intro acc h
                        simp
                        apply IH
                        rw [afuncDef]
                        cases y
                        simp
                        split
                        · cases acc
                          · contradiction
                          · simp
                        · exact h
                    apply h_mono
                    simp

rw [List.foldl_cons]
                    have preserve : ∀ l x, l ≠ [] → afunc l x ≠ [] := by
                      intro l x hl
                      simp [afuncDef]
                      by_cases h : index₁ = x.2 <;> simp [h, hl]
                    have mono : ∀ l acc, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l
                      induction l with
                      | nil => intro acc h; exact h
                      | cons x xs ih => intro acc h; rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih; apply preserve; exact h
                    apply mono
                    apply preserve
                    simp

simp at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    have afunc_ne_nil : ∀ acc x, acc ≠ [] → afunc acc x ≠ [] := by
                      intros acc x h
                      rw [afuncDef]
                      cases acc
                      · contradiction
                      · simp; split <;> simp
                    have foldl_ne_nil : ∀ l acc, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l
                      induction l with
                      | nil => intros; simp; assumption
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        intros acc h
                        simp
                        apply ih
                        apply afunc_ne_nil _ _ h
                    apply foldl_ne_nil
                    simp

have preserve_ne : ∀ l acc, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l acc h
                      induction l generalizing acc
                      case nil => exact h
                      case cons x xs ih =>
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]
                        apply ih
                        simp [afuncDef]
                        split
                        · simp
                        · exact h
                    apply preserve_ne
                    simp

have h_preserves : ∀ l x, l ≠ [] → afunc l x ≠ [] := by
                      intro l ⟨DT, idx⟩ hl
                      rw [afuncDef]
                      dsimp
                      split
                      · simp
                      · exact hl
                    have h_fold : ∀ l acc, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l
                      induction l with
                      | nil => intro acc h; exact h
                      | cons y ys ih =>
                        intro acc h
                        simp
                        apply ih
                        apply h_preserves _ _ h
                    apply h_fold
                    simp

have h_step : ∀ l x, l ≠ [] → afunc l x ≠ [] := by
                      intro l x hl
                      simp [afuncDef]
                      split
                      · apply List.ne_nil_of_length_pos
                        rw [List.length_append]
                        apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (List.length_pos_of_ne_nil hl) (Nat.le_add_right _ _)
                      · exact hl
                    have h_fold : ∀ xs acc, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc xs ≠ [] := by
                      intro xs
                      induction xs with
                      | nil => intros; assumption
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        intro acc h
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]
                        apply ih
                        apply h_step _ _ h
                    rw [List.foldl_cons]
                    apply h_fold
                    apply h_step
                    exact h_head_tail_neq_nil

let rec aux (L : List _) (acc : List _) (h : acc ≠ []) : List.foldl afunc acc L ≠ [] :=
                      match L with
                      | [] => h
                      | x :: xs => by
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]
                        apply aux xs
                        simp [afuncDef]
                        split <;> simp [h]
                    apply aux
                    simp

have h_mono : ∀ l₁ l₂, l₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc l₁ l₂ ≠ [] := by
                      intro l₁ l₂
                      induction l₂ generalizing l₁
                      case nil => intro h; exact h
                      case cons y ys ih =>
                        intro h
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]
                        apply ih
                        simp [afuncDef]
                        split
                        · simp
                        · exact h
                    apply h_mono
                    exact h_head_tail_neq_nil
